want: to have a seamless conversation with three analyst personas during analysis without seeing phase boundaries, step headers, or menus
so_that: the analysis feels like a productive discussion with experts rather than navigating a structured questionnaire

want: the codebase scan to happen silently while I start discussing the problem with Maya
so_that: I'm immediately engaged in conversation without waiting for a scanning phase to complete

want: all analysis artifacts (requirements, impact analysis, architecture, design) to be produced progressively during the conversation
so_that: by the end of the conversation all phases are complete and I don't have to wait for sequential agent-driven phases to run

want: Alex and Jordan to present options with recommendations and reasoning rather than asking me open-ended technical questions
so_that: I can make informed decisions without needing deep technical expertise, and the analysis progresses even if I defer to their recommendations

want: the system to produce strong requirements artifacts from my business input and reasonable architecture/design artifacts from codebase analysis alone
so_that: I can prepare work for implementation even though I don't have the technical depth to answer architecture and design questions

want: Alex and Jordan to engage with me at a deep technical level from the start of the conversation
so_that: I can validate my own thinking against the system's analysis and provide technical direction early

want: each functional requirement in the produced artifacts to have a confidence indicator (high/medium/low)
so_that: the build verb and reviewers know which requirements are well-established and which are assumptions that need validation

want: to end the analysis conversation at any time and get usable partial artifacts
so_that: I'm not forced to complete a long analysis session to get any value, and my partial progress is preserved

want: the system to verify artifact consistency across all phases before finalizing
so_that: I can trust that the requirements, architecture, and design artifacts agree with each other

want: to optionally enable agent teams mode for faster and deeper analysis
so_that: I can trade token cost for speed and depth when the analysis warrants it

want: the analysis to cover all relevant topics without me having to know what topics exist
so_that: I get a thorough analysis without needing to prompt the system to cover specific areas like security or error handling

want: to request deeper exploration of specific topics after the system suggests completion
so_that: I can get additional depth on areas I care most about without restarting the analysis
